_comment: urOMT model/algorithm settings. Data settings (scans, mask, voxel spacing, domain size) are read directly from planC and are NOT stored here. Mirrors cfg fields (b) from the MATLAB getParams.m.

_field_doc.sigma: diffusion coefficient (Gaussian bandwidth) in the advection-diffusion PDE
_field_doc.dt: time-step size for the inner numerical integration
_field_doc.nt: number of inner time sub-steps between two consecutive image frames
_field_doc.beta: weight on the final-image fidelity term (Gamma3)
_field_doc.niter_pcg: max iterations for the (P)CG Hessian/diffusion solves
_field_doc.maxUiter: outer optimization iterations per time interval
_field_doc.reinitR: 0=initialize each interval with the previous evolved density (consecutive); 1=reset to the measured frame
_field_doc.smooth: number of smoothing iterations applied to each frame (0=off)
_field_doc.spacing: voxel spacing [dx,dy,dz] override; null=use planC scan geometry
_field_doc.time: 1-based selection into the supplied scan list: first_time:time_jump:last_time (last_time=null -> last scan)
